query: SELECT id, section, entity, status, current_stage, progress, started_at, finished_at, error_message, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, started_at, NOW()) as elapsed_min FROM sync_logs WHERE started_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 15;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT id, section, entity, status, current_stage, progress, started_at, finished_at, error_message, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, started_at, NOW()) as elapsed_min FROM sync_logs WHERE started_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 15;
